name: gpd-arxiv
description: Optional arXiv paper search, retrieval, and analysis via arxiv-mcp-server (>=0.3.2). Available only when the optional arxiv-mcp-server dependency is installed. Search for papers with advanced filtering (date ranges, categories, field-specific queries), download and convert PDFs to markdown, read full paper text, and perform deep paper analysis with multi-turn research context tracking.
prerequisites: Install GPD before enabling built-in MCP servers.
availability_condition: Available only when the optional Python module 'arxiv_mcp_server' is installed.
